working_on: Routine task AUDIT-LOG (T-PHASE-5-AUDIT) — Logic (philosophical) subdomain audit. SEP-anchored review of a deterministic 35%-density edge sample (k=12 of N=34) plus an edge-anchored node sample (8 of 15 unique nodes), per the master-plan prompt templates at engine/build_readiness/phase_5_production_audit.md. Single deliverable: engine/build_readiness/phase_5_production_audit_evidence/logic.md. Routine-mode is parametric-only — empirical-fortification branch prohibited per master-plan §"Empirical-fortification branch" routine-mode prohibition (load-bearing until T1-A through T1-D close at the closeout interactive session per ADR 0053).
declared_scope: Author engine/build_readiness/phase_5_production_audit_evidence/logic.md as candidate-findings evidence for the 12-edge sample (k=12 of N=34 within-logic edges from 0090_seed_logic_part1.sql; 35.3% density per master-plan §"Sample-size policy" AUDIT-LOG row) plus the 8-node edge-anchored sample (from a 15-element edge-anchored union) — verdict + SEP-anchored reasoning + confidence per element per the verbatim master-plan prompt templates and evidence-file schema. scope_delivery.explanation: Yes — AUDIT-LOG fully delivered: 12-edge + 8-node SEP-anchored review landed in logic.md (182 lines) per the master-plan prompt templates and evidence-file schema; both task criteria pass; no descope, reorder, or deferral mid-session. Parametric-only review per master-plan §"Empirical-fortification branch" routine-mode prohibition; one medium-confidence + mutation-implying verdict (E-7 conditional_logic→chisholm_paradox) gets fortified at the closeout.

outcome_summary: Routine session S-0111 against T-PHASE-5-AUDIT task AUDIT-LOG landed a 12-edge + 8-node SEP-anchored review per the master-plan prompt templates at engine/build_readiness/phase_5_production_audit.md (per S-0082 master-plan + S-0081 audit-warrant gate decision drawer in paideia/decisions; per S-0104 cross-bridge calibration; per S-0105 epistemology + S-0108 ethics + S-0109 metaphysics + S-0110 mind precedents; per S-0107 master-plan tightening that made the empirical-fortification branch routine-mode prohibition load-bearing). Single deliverable: engine/build_readiness/phase_5_production_audit_evidence/logic.md (182 lines). Edge-verdict tally: 11 sound (91.7%), 1 defensible (E-7 conditional_logic→chisholm_paradox — multi-prereq overdetermined; deontic_logic→chisholm_paradox is also a seed edge at E-11 in this sample, the bare paradox derives from SDL apparatus + the classical material conditional + the deduction theorem, conditional_logic illuminates the response literature — Hansson 1969 dyadic deontic, Belnap-Horty stit, dropping contraction in relevance/linear logic — but is not strictly required for the basic Chisholm formulation; closeout disposition: retire OR retain as illuminating-the-response-literature with no graph mutation). Node-verdict tally: 8 sound, 0 granularity-mismatch, 0 authenticity concerns. Substantive defects: 1 of 20 sampled elements (5%) — LOWEST within-subdomain rate of the routine block to date; below S-0105 epistemology (5.4%), well below S-0108 ethics (16.7%), S-0109 metaphysics (14.3%), S-0110 mind (10.8%); well below the cross-bridge baseline (35.2% per AUDIT-CB at S-0104). The pattern fits the structural prediction that within-subdomain edges run cleaner than cross-domain bridges — and within-logic specifically runs cleanest because the formal-systems hierarchy (propositional ⊂ predicate ⊂ classical; modal as a propositional extension; deontic as a modal extension; conditionals as a propositional / modal question) tightly determines pedagogical direction in a way that contested philosophical concepts (e.g., the property-dualism / knowledge-argument relation in the mind seed) do not. Mid-sample expansion trigger (>60% at half-sample → expand to 50%) was nowhere near firing — half-sample defect rate (E-1 through E-6) was 0/6 = 0%; standard 35% density held. Zero direction reversals (distinct from S-0110 mind 2 reversals, S-0108 ethics 1, S-0105 epistemology 1) — formal-systems subdomain has objectively right pedagogical directions in a way position-vs-argument subdomains do not. Zero granularity-mismatch verdicts (distinct from S-0105 N-8 bayesian_epistemology, S-0108 N-4 moral_epistemology + N-9 animal_ethics, S-0109 N-4 modality + N-6 mereology, S-0110 N-2 phenomenology) — foundation-level formal-system nodes (predicate_logic, classical_logic) are at appropriate granularity, not discipline labels in the per-node prompt's warning sense (the prompt's discipline-name examples are 'Political Philosophy', 'Metaphysics', 'Ontology'; 'classical logic' and 'predicate logic' are specific formal systems with precisely-defined syntax/semantics, parallel in granularity to 'modal_logic' or 'deontic_logic'). One load-bearing aggregate observation surfaced for the closeout: E-7 conditional_logic→chisholm_paradox is a NEW class of overdetermined edge — multi-prereq edge where the bare paradox is derivable from a more proximate prereq (deontic_logic) and the second prereq (conditional_logic) illuminates the response literature but isn't strictly required for the basic formulation; distinct in shape from the species-shadowing-genus pattern S-0108 E-17/E-20, the long-distance shortcut pattern S-0109 E-10, the tools-vs-topic ordering pattern S-0110 E-12 — same redundancy-class umbrella but a new sub-shape. Did NOT corroborate S-0110 argument-vs-position directionality candidate — logic subdomain's node taxonomy has no 'arguments' vs 'positions' analogue; closest is paradoxes vs responses-to-paradoxes but those run canonical direction with zero reversals here. Empty `evidence` field uniform null across all 34 within-logic edges (master-plan §T2-E pre-listed; confirmed graph-wide again — sixth session in a row). No new gate-feasible audit-system-input class authored as deliverable — the four pre-listed master-plan proposals plus S-0104's cross_bridge_pedagogical_direction_inconsistent_with_summary candidate plus S-0110's argument-vs-position directionality candidate were not extended (within-logic data did not corroborate any new pattern beyond those already identified). Parametric-only review per master-plan routine-mode prohibition (load-bearing until T1-A through T1-D close at the closeout per ADR 0053); medium-confidence + mutation-implying verdicts (E-7) get fortified at the closeout per the master-plan §"Forward pointers to closeout" fortification scope. 0 HANDOFF entries; 0 Issues filed; 0 hard-fails (validate.py 31 checks; soft-warns 372 = 366 Phase-5 missing_rigor_score carryover + 5 issue_collision + 1 adr_consequences_deliverable_audit; the issue_collision count of 5 vs S-0110 baseline of 5 is unchanged). AUDIT-LOG criteria pass (file_exists + validate_passes); marked complete in close commit. Next eligible task: AUDIT-LAN (depends_on AUDIT-CB satisfied + no other dependencies; philosophy of language subdomain, 11 of 31 edges at 35% density). 5 subdomain audits + AUDIT-HT remain in T-PHASE-5-AUDIT before closeout.
